4.2.0.7 分裂单态射与满态射是单态射与满态射： 截面是单态射。收缩是满态射。同构是双态射。

Proof: Let \(f: a \to b\) be a section in \(\mathsf{C}\); then it has a left inverse \(g: b \to a\). Suppose that \(h_0, h_1: d \to a\) are morphisms in \(\mathsf{C}\) such that \(f \circ h_0 = f \circ h_1\), then \[h_0 = g \circ f \circ h_0 = g \circ f \circ h_1 = h_1, \tag{28}\] and \(f\) is left-cancellable and monic.
Let \(f: a \to b\) be a retraction in \(\mathsf{C}\); then it has a right inverse \(h: b \to a\). Suppose that \(g_0, g_1: b \to c\) are morphisms in \(\mathsf{C}\) such that \(g_0 \circ f = g_1 \circ f\), then \[g_0 = g_0 \circ f \circ h = g_1 \circ f \circ h = g_1, \tag{29}\] and \(f\) is right-cancellable and epic.
An isomorphism has both left and right inverses and is both left-cancellable and right-cancellable, and so is a bimorphism. ■









4.2.0.8 Proposition: Let \(f: a \to b\) be a morphism in a category \(\mathsf{C}\). Then the following are equivalent:

\(f\) is a monomorphism and a retraction;
\(f\) is an epimorphism and a section; and
\(f\) is an isomorphism.



[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.8 命题： 设 \(f: a \to b\) 为范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中的一个态射。则以下各项等价：

\(f\) 是单态射且是收缩；
\(f\) 是满态射且是截面；
\(f\) 是同构。


Proof: An isomorphism is a monomorphism, an epimorphism, a section, and a retraction. If \(f: a \to b\) is a monomorphism and a retraction, then there is a morphism \(g: b \to a\) such that \(f \circ g = \text{id}_b\). Composing \(f\) on the right, we have \(f \circ g \circ f = \text{id}_b \circ f = f = f \circ \text{id}_a\). Since \(f\) is left-cancellable, we have \(g \circ f = \text{id}_a\), and then \(g\) is the inverse of \(f\). If \(f: a \to b\) is an epimorphism and a section, then there is a morphism \(g: b \to a\) such that \(g \circ f = \text{id}_a\). Composing \(f\) on the left, we have \(f \circ g \circ f = f \circ \text{id}_a = f = \text{id}_b \circ f\). Since \(f\) is right-cancellable, we have \(f \circ g = \text{id}_b\), and then \(g\) is the inverse of \(f\). ■









4.2.0.9 Extremal monomorphisms and epimorphisms: Let \(f: a \to b\) be a morphism in a category \(\mathsf{C}\); it is called

an extremal monomorphism if \(f\) is monic and for every morphism \(g: c \to b\) and every epimorphism \(h: a \to c\) if \(f = g \circ h\) then \(h\) is an isomorphism;
an extremal epimorphism if \(f\) is epic and for every morphism \(h: a \to c\) and every monomorphism \(g: c \to b\) if \(f = g \circ h\) then \(g\) is an isomorphism; or
an extremal bimorphism if it is both an extremal monomorphism and an extremal epimorphism.



[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.9 极大单态射与极大满态射： 设 \(f: a \to b\) 为范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中的一个态射；它被称为：

极大单态射 (extremal monomorphism)，如果 \(f\) 是单态射，且对于每一个态射 \(g: c \to b\) 和每一个满态射 \(h: a \to c\)，若 \(f = g \circ h\)，则 \(h\) 是同构；
极大满态射 (extremal epimorphism)，如果 \(f\) 是满态射，且对于每一个态射 \(h: a \to c\) 和每一个单态射 \(g: c \to b\)，若 \(f = g \circ h\)，则 \(g\) 是同构；或
极大双态射 (extremal bimorphism)，如果它既是极大单态射又是极大满态射。











4.2.0.10 Compositions of extremal monomorphisms and epimorphisms: The composition of extremal monomorphisms is an extremal monomorphism. The composition of extremal epimorphisms is an extremal epimorphism. The composition of extremal bimorphisms is an extremal bimorphism.


[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.10 极大单态射与极大满态射的复合： 极大单态射的复合是极大单态射。极大满态射的复合是极大满态射。极大双态射的复合是极大双态射。










4.2.0.11 Split monomorphisms and epimorphisms are extremal: A section is an extremal monomorphism. A retraction is an extremal epimorphism.


[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.11 分裂单态射与分裂满态射是极大的： 截面是极大单态射。收缩是极大满态射。




Proof: Let \(f: a \to b\) be a section in \(\mathsf{C}\); then it has a left inverse \(g: b \to a\). Suppose that \(f = h \circ k\) and \(k\) is epic. \[\text{id}_a = g \circ f = g \circ h \circ k \tag{30}\] Since \(k\) has a left inverse, it is a section, but since it is epic, it is an isomorphism. We conclude that \(f\) is an extremal monomorphism. Let \(f: a \to b\) be a retraction in \(\mathsf{C}\); then it has a right inverse \(g: b \to a\). Suppose that \(f = h \circ k\) and \(g\) is monic. \[\text{id}_b = f \circ g = h \circ k \circ g \tag{31}\] Since \(h\) has a right inverse, it is a retraction, but since it is monic, it is an isomorphism. We conclude that \(f\) is an extremal epimorphism. ■






4.2.0.12 Endomorphisms: An endomorphism of \(a \in \mathsf{C}\) in a category \(\mathsf{C}\) is a morphism \(f: a \to a\). The class of endomorphisms of \(a\) is denoted by \(\text{End}(a)\). An endomorphism \(f: a \to a\) is called

an idempotent if \(f^2 = f\); it is split if there are morphisms \(g: a \to b\) and \(h: b \to a\) such that \(f = h \circ g\) and \(g \circ h = \text{id}_b\); or
an automorphism if it is also an isomorphism; the class of automorphisms of \(a\) is denoted \(\text{Aut}(a)\).



[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.12 自态射： 范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中对象 \(a \in \mathsf{C}\) 的一个自态射 (endomorphism) 是指态射 \(f: a \to a\)。\(a\) 的自态射类记作 \(\text{End}(a)\)。一个自态射 \(f: a \to a\) 被称为：

幂等态射 (idempotent)，如果 \(f^2 = f\)；它是分裂的 (split)，如果存在态射 \(g: a \to b\) 和 \(h: b \to a\) 使得 \(f = h \circ g\) 且 \(g \circ h = \text{id}_b\)；或
自同构 (automorphism)，如果它同时也是一个同构；\(a\) 的自同构类记作 \(\text{Aut}(a)\)。











4.2.0.13 Endomorphism monoids and automorphism groups: For locally small categories, \(\text{End}(a)\) is a set and forms a monoid under morphism composition, while \(\text{Aut}(a)\) forms a group under morphism composition called the automorphism group of \(a\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.13 自态射幺半群与自同构群： 对于局部小范畴，\(\text{End}(a)\) 是一个集合，并在态射复合下构成一个幺半群；而 \(\text{Aut}(a)\) 在态射复合下构成一个群，称为 \(a\) 的自同构群。










4.2.0.14 Definition: Two objects \(a\) and \(b\) are isomorphic in the category \(\mathsf{C}\) if there is an isomorphism \(f: a \to b\), denoted \(a \simeq^f b\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.14 定义： 如果范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中存在同构 \(f: a \to b\)，则称两个对象 \(a\) 和 \(b\) 是同构的 (isomorphic)，记作 \(a \simeq^f b\)。










4.2.0.15 Proposition: The relation of isomorphism of objects is an equivalence relation.


[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.15 命题： 对象间的同构关系是一种等价关系。










4.2.0.16 Initial and terminal objects: An object \(s\) in a category \(\mathsf{C}\) is initial if for each object \(a\) in \(\mathsf{C}\) there is exactly one morphism \(s \to a\). An object \(t\) in a category \(\mathsf{C}\) is terminal if from each object \(a\) in \(\mathsf{C}\) there is exactly one morphism \(a \to t\). An object \(z\) in a category \(\mathsf{C}\) is zero if it is both initial and terminal; for any two objects \(a, b \in \mathsf{C}\) there is a unique morphism \(a \to z \to b\), called the zero morphism from \(a\) to \(b\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.16 始对象与终对象： 范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中的对象 \(s\) 被称为始对象 (initial)，如果对于 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中的每个对象 \(a\)，都恰好存在一个态射 \(s \to a\)。对象 \(t\) 被称为终对象 (terminal)，如果对于 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中的每个对象 \(a\)，都恰好存在一个态射 \(a \to t\)。对象 \(z\) 被称为零对象 (zero)，如果它既是始对象又是终对象；对于任意两个对象 \(a, b \in \mathsf{C}\)，存在唯一的态射 \(a \to z \to b\)，称为从 \(a\) 到 \(b\) 的零态射 (zero morphism)。










4.2.0.17 Proposition: In a category \(\mathsf{C}\) a initial or terminal object, if exists, is unique up to isomorphisms.


[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.17 命题： 在范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 中，始对象或终对象（如果存在）在同构意义下是唯一的。










4.2.0.18 Proposition: Any composition with a zero morphism is a zero morphism.


[点击展开翻译]

4.2.0.18 命题： 与零态射的任何复合仍为零态射。

title: CATEGORY THEORY
text:
The category of sets. In any compatible set theory, such as ZFC, there is no set of all sets to avoid the Russel’s paradox. Therefore, there is only the metacategory of all sets, not a category. To avoid the foundational problems in set theory, we shall assume that there is a big enough set \(U\), the universe, then describe a set \(x\) as small if it is a member of the universe. Then we have an actual category \(\mathsf{Set}\), the category of all small sets, which is itself a large category.


[点击展开翻译]

集合范畴。 在任何相容的集合论（如 ZFC）中，为了避免罗素悖论，不存在“所有集合的集合”。因此，只存在所有集合的元范畴（metacategory），而非范畴。 为了避免集合论中的基础性问题，我们假设存在一个足够大的集合 \(U\)，即全集 (universe)，然后当一个集合 \(x\) 是全集的成员时，将其描述为小的 (small)。于是我们得到了一个实际的范畴 \(\mathsf{Set}\)，即所有小集合构成的范畴，其本身是一个大 (large) 范畴。



Recall that \(f: X \to Y\) denotes a map from the domain \(X\) to the target \(Y\).


[点击展开翻译]

回想一下，\(f: X \to Y\) 表示从定义域 (domain) \(X\) 到靶 (target) \(Y\) 的一个映射 (map)。







4.3.1.1 The category of small sets: The category \(\mathsf{Set}\) is the category of small sets and maps between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map \(\text{id}_X: X \to X, p \mapsto p\) at each small set \(X\), and the composition is the composition of maps.


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.1.1 小集合范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 是以小集合为对象、以它们之间的映射为态射的范畴。恒等态射在每个小集合 \(X\) 上取恒等映射 (identity map) \(\text{id}_X: X \to X, p \mapsto p\)，而复合运算即映射的复合。




The category \(\mathsf{Set}\) is a large but locally small category.


[点击展开翻译]

范畴 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 是一个大的但局部小的范畴。







4.3.1.2 Remark: For \(X, Y \in \mathsf{Set}\), the hom-set \(\mathsf{Set}(X, Y)\) is denoted by \(\text{Map}(X; Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.1.2 备注： 对于 \(X, Y \in \mathsf{Set}\)，态射集 (hom-set) \(\mathsf{Set}(X, Y)\) 记作 \(\text{Map}(X; Y)\)。










4.3.1.3 Definition: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be a map between sets and \(A \subseteq X, f(A) \subseteq B \subseteq Y\). The submap of \(f\) from \(A\) to \(B\) is defined by \[f|_{A,B}: A \to B, \quad p \mapsto f(p). \tag{32}\] The restriction of \(f\) on \(A\) is the map \(f|_A = f|_{A,Y}: A \to Y\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.1.3 定义： 设 \(f: X \to Y\) 为集合间的映射，且 \(A \subseteq X, f(A) \subseteq B \subseteq Y\)。\(f\) 从 \(A\) 到 \(B\) 的子映射 (submap) 定义为： \[f|_{A,B}: A \to B, \quad p \mapsto f(p). \tag{32}\] \(f\) 在 \(A\) 上的限制 (restriction) 是映射 \(f|_A = f|_{A,Y}: A \to Y\)。




Recall the definition of injective, surjective, and bijective maps.


[点击展开翻译]

回想单射、满射和双射映射的定义。







4.3.1.4 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Set}\) the monomorphisms are the injections, and the epimorphisms are the surjections, which are all split, and hence extremal. The bimorphisms are bijections, which are also isomorphisms.


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.1.4 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 中，单态射是单射 (injections)，满态射是满射 (surjections)，它们都是分裂的，因此也是极大的。双态射是双射 (bijections)，它们同时也是同构。










4.3.1.5 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Set}\) all monomorphisms and epimorphisms are extremal.


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.1.5 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 中，所有单态射和满态射都是极大的。










4.3.1.6 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Set}\) the endomorphisms are maps \(f: X \to X\) for some \(X \in \mathsf{Set}\); the class of endomorphisms of \(a\) is denoted \(\text{Map}(X; X)\); the idempotents are projections the automorphisms are bijections \(f: X \to X\). The automorphism group of \(X \in \mathsf{Set}\) is its permutation group \(S_X\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.1.6 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 中，自态射是某些 \(X \in \mathsf{Set}\) 的映射 \(f: X \to X\)；\(a\) 的自态射类记作 \(\text{Map}(X; X)\)；幂等态射是投影 (projections)，自同构是双射 \(f: X \to X\)。\(X \in \mathsf{Set}\) 的自同构群是它的置换群 (permutation group) \(S_X\)。










4.3.1.7 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Set}\) the empty set \(\emptyset\) is an initial object and any singleton is a terminal object, the isomorphism class of which denoted by \(*\). There is no zero object or morphism in \(\mathsf{Set}\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.1.7 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 中，空集 \(\emptyset\) 是始对象，任何单元素集是终对象，其同构类记为 \(*\)。在 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 中不存在零对象或零态射。













4.3.2.1 Definition: A pointed set is an ordered pair \((X, p)\), where \(X\) is a set and \(p\) is an element of \(X\). A pointed map between pointed sets \((X, p)\) and \((Y, q)\) is a map \(f: X \to Y\) with \(f(p) = q\), and we write \(F: (X, p) \to (Y, q)\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.2.1 定义： 带基点集合 (pointed set) 是一个有序对 \((X, p)\)，其中 \(X\) 是一个集合且 \(p\) 是 \(X\) 中的一个元素。带基点集合 \((X, p)\) 与 \((Y, q)\) 之间的带基点映射 (pointed map) 是满足 \(f(p) = q\) 的映射 \(f: X \to Y\)，我们记作 \(F: (X, p) \to (Y, q)\)。










4.3.2.2 The category of small pointed sets: The category \(\mathsf{Set}_*\) is the category of small pointed sets and pointed maps between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small pointed set, and the composition is the composition of pointed maps.


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.2.2 小带基点集合范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Set}_*\) 是以小带基点集合为对象、以它们之间的带基点映射为态射的范畴。恒等态射在每个小带基点集合上取恒等映射，复合运算即带基点映射的复合。










4.3.2.3 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Set}_*\) any singleton is a zero object, the isomorphism class of which also denoted by \(*\). For any \((X, p), (Y, q) \in \mathsf{Set}_*\) the zero morphism is the constant map sending everything in \(X\) to \(q\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.2.3 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Set}_*\) 中，任何单元素集都是零对象，其同构类也记作 \(*\)。对于任何 \((X, p), (Y, q) \in \mathsf{Set}_*\)，零态射是将 \(X\) 中的所有元素都映射到 \(q\) 的常数映射。













4.3.3.1 Binary relations: Let \(X\) and \(Y\) be sets. A binary relation \(R\) from \(X\) to \(Y\) is a subset of \(X \times Y\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.3.1 二元关系： 设 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 为集合。从 \(X\) 到 \(Y\) 的二元关系 (binary relation) \(R\) 是 \(X \times Y\) 的一个子集。










4.3.3.2 Identity and composite relations: The identity relation on a set \(X\) is the diagonal \(\{(x, x) \in X \times X : x \in X\}\). If \(X, Y, Z\) are sets, \(R\) is a binary relation from \(X\) to \(Y\), and \(S\) is a binary relation from \(Y\) to \(Z\), their composite relation of \(S \circ R\) is a binary relation from \(X\) to \(Z\), defined as the relative product \[S \circ R = \{(x, z) \in X \times Z : (\exists y \in Y)((x, y) \in R \wedge (y, z) \in S)\}. \tag{33}\]


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.3.2 恒等关系与复合关系： 集合 \(X\) 上的恒等关系 (identity relation) 是对角集 \(\{(x, x) \in X \times X : x \in X\}\)。若 \(X, Y, Z\) 是集合，\(R\) 是从 \(X\) 到 \(Y\) 的二元关系，\(S\) 是从 \(Y\) 到 \(Z\) 的二元关系，它们的复合关系 (composite relation) \(S \circ R\) 是从 \(X\) 到 \(Z\) 的二元关系，定义为如下相对乘积 (relative product)： \[S \circ R = \{(x, z) \in X \times Z : (\exists y \in Y)((x, y) \in R \wedge (y, z) \in S)\}. \tag{33}\]










4.3.3.3 The category of small sets with binary relations: The category \(\mathsf{Rel}\) is the category of small sets and binary relations between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small pointed set, and the composition is the composition of pointed maps. The identity morphism \(X \to X\) is the identity relation on \(X\), consisting of all \((x, x)\) for \(x \in X\).


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.3.3 具有二元关系的小集合范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Rel}\) 是以小集合为对象、以它们之间的二元关系为态射的范畴。恒等态射在每个小集合上取恒等映射，复合运算即映射的复合。\(X \to X\) 的恒等态射是 \(X\) 上的恒等关系，由所有满足 \(x \in X\) 的 \((x, x)\) 组成。










4.3.3.4 Remark: This category \(\mathsf{Rel}\) contains \(\mathsf{Set}\) as a subcategory (Definition 4.6.2.1) on the same objects, where each function \(f: X \to Y\) is interpreted as the binary relation given by the graph \[\Gamma(f) = \{(x, fx) \in X \times Y : x \in X\}. \tag{34}\] But \(\mathsf{Rel}\) has added structure. For each \(R: X \to Y\) there is a converse relation \(R^*: Y \to X\) given by \[R^* = \{(y, x) \in Y \times X : (x, y) \in R\}. \tag{35}\]


[点击展开翻译]

4.3.3.4 备注： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Rel}\) 在相同对象上包含 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 作为一个子范畴（定义 4.6.2.1），其中每个函数 \(f: X \to Y\) 被解释为由其图像给出的二元关系： \[\Gamma(f) = \{(x, fx) \in X \times Y : x \in X\}. \tag{34}\] 但 \(\mathsf{Rel}\) 具有额外的结构。对于每个 \(R: X \to Y\)，存在一个逆关系 (converse relation) \(R^*: Y \to X\)，由下式给出： \[R^* = \{(y, x) \in Y \times X : (x, y) \in R\}. \tag{35}\]

title: CATEGORY THEORY
text:
4.4.1.1 The category of small groups: The category \(\mathsf{Grp}\) is the category of small groups and group homomorphisms between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small group, and the composition is the composition of group homomorphisms.


[点击展开翻译]

4.4.1.1 小群范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Grp}\) 是以小群为对象、以它们之间的群同态为态射的范畴。恒等态射在每个小群上取恒等映射，复合运算即群同态的复合。










4.4.1.2 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Grp}\) the monomorphisms are the injective homomorphisms, but not all of them are sections; the epimorphisms are surjective homomorphisms, but not all of them are retractions.


[点击展开翻译]

4.4.1.2 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Grp}\) 中，单态射是单同态，但并非所有单同态都是截面；满态射是满同态，但并非所有满同态都是收缩。










4.4.1.3 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Grp}\) the group \(\{1\}\) with one element is a zero object.


[点击展开翻译]

4.4.1.3 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Grp}\) 中，仅含一个元素的群 \(\{1\}\) 是零对象。













4.4.2.1 The category of small monoids: The category \(\mathsf{Mon}\) is the category of small monoids and morphisms of monoids as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small monoid, and the composition is the composition of morphisms.


[点击展开翻译]

4.4.2.1 小幺半群范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Mon}\) 是以小幺半群为对象、以幺半群态射为态射的范畴。恒等态射在每个小幺半群上取恒等映射，复合运算即态射的复合。













4.4.3.1 The category of small abelian groups: The category \(\mathsf{Ab}\) is the category of abelian groups and group homomorphisms between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small abelian group, and the composition is the composition of group homomorphisms.


[点击展开翻译]

4.4.3.1 小阿贝尔群范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Ab}\) 是以阿贝尔群为对象、以它们之间的群同态为态射的范畴。恒等态射在每个小阿贝尔群上取恒等映射，复合运算即群同态的复合。










4.4.3.2 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Ab}\) the zero object is the abelian group with one element, denoted by 0.


[点击展开翻译]

4.4.3.2 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Ab}\) 中，零对象是仅含一个元素的阿贝尔群，记作 0。

title: MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
text:
The category \(\mathsf{Top}\).






5.1.1.1 The category of small topological spaces: The category \(\mathsf{Top}\) is the category of small topological spaces and continuous maps between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small topological space, and the composition is the composition of maps.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.1 小拓扑空间范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 是以小拓扑空间为对象、以它们之间的连续映射为态射的范畴。恒等态射取每个小拓扑空间上的恒等映射，复合运算即为映射的复合。




The category \(\mathsf{Top}\) is a large but locally small category. 范畴 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 是一个大范畴，但是局部小范畴。






5.1.1.2 Remark: For \(X, Y \in \mathsf{Top}\), the hom-set \(\mathsf{Top}(X, Y)\) is denoted by \(C(X; Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.2 备注： 对于 \(X, Y \in \mathsf{Top}\)，态射集 \(\mathsf{Top}(X, Y)\) 记作 \(C(X; Y)\)。










5.1.1.3 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Top}\) the monomorphisms are the continuous injections, the epimorphisms are the continuous surjections, and the bimorphisms are continuous bijections.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.3 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中，单态射是连续单射，满态射是连续满射，而双态射是连续双射。




Proof: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be a morphism in \(\mathsf{Top}\), namely a continuous map. If \(f\) is monic, then it is left-cancellable. For any \(p_0, p_1 \in X\) with \(f(p_0) = f(p_1)\), we consider the constant maps \(c_{p_0} : * \to X\) and \(c_{p_1} : * \to X\) sending the singleton to \(p_0\) and \(p_1\), respectively; then we have \(f \circ c_{p_0} = f \circ c_{p_1} : X \to Y\). Cancelling \(f\) on the left we have \(c_{p_0} = c_{p_1}\), which implies that \(p_0 = p_1\) and \(f\) is an injection. If \(f\) is injective, then let \(h_0, h_1 : Z \to X\) be continuous maps such that \(f \circ h_0 = f \circ h_1\). For any \(r \in Z\), we have \(f(h_0(r)) = f(h_1(r))\), and by injectivity we have \(h_0(r) = h_1(r)\), this implies that \(h_0 = h_1\). Then, \(f\) is left-cancellable and is a monomorphism.
If \(f\) is epic, then it is right-cancellable. Let \(g_0: Y \to 2_{\text{triv}} = (\{0, 1\}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{triv}})\) be the constant map with value 0. Let \(g_1: Y \to 2_{\text{triv}}\) send all members of \(f(X)\) to 0 and other ones to 1. Then, \(g_0 \circ f = g_1 \circ f : X \to 2_{\text{triv}}\) is the constant map with value 0, but \(g_0 = g_1\) only when \(f(X) = Y\) and \(f\) is a surjection. If \(f\) is surjective, then let \(g_0, g_1 : Y \to Z\) be continuous maps such that \(g_0 \circ f = g_1 \circ f\). For any \(q \in Y\), by surjectivity there is \(p \in f^{-1}(q)\), and we have \(g_0(q) = g_0(f(p)) = g_1(f(p)) = g_1(q)\), this implies that \(g_0 = g_1\). Then, \(f\) is right-cancellable and is an epimorphism. ■






5.1.1.4 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Top}\) the empty space \(\emptyset\) (Example 3.1.3.1) is the initial object and the point spaces (as representatives of) \(*\) (Example 3.1.3.2) are the terminal objects.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.4 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中，空空间 \(\emptyset\)（例 3.1.3.1）是始对象，而点空间（作为其代表的）\(*\)（例 3.1.3.2）是终对象。










5.1.1.5 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Top}\) the unique morphism from \(\emptyset\) to a topological space \(X\) is the empty map; the initial topology on the set \(X\) induced by this map is the trivial topology. The unique morphism from a topological space \(X\) to (any representative of) \(*\) is the constant map; the final topology on the set \(X\) induced by this map is the discrete topology.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.5 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中，从 \(\emptyset\) 到拓扑空间 \(X\) 的唯一态射是空映射；由该映射诱导的集合 \(X\) 上的初始拓扑是平凡拓扑。从拓扑空间 \(X\) 到（任何代表）\(*\) 的唯一态射是常数映射；由该映射诱导的集合 \(X\) 上的最终拓扑是离散拓扑。












5.1.2.1 The category of small pointed topological spaces: The category \(\mathsf{Top}_*\) is the category of small pointed topological spaces and pointed continuous maps between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small pointed topological space, and the composition is the composition of pointed maps.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.2.1 小带基点拓扑空间范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Top}_*\) 是以小带基点拓扑空间为对象、以它们之间的带基点连续映射为态射的范畴。恒等态射取每个小带基点拓扑空间上的恒等映射，复合运算即为带基点映射的复合。
















5.2.1.1 Definition: A map \[f: (X, \mathcal{T}_X) \to (Y, \mathcal{T}_Y) \tag{39}\] * is open iff \((\forall U \in \mathcal{T}_X)(f(U) \in \mathcal{T}_Y)\); * is closed iff \((\forall A \in \mathcal{C}_X)(f(A) \in \mathcal{C}_Y)\), where \(\mathcal{C}_X\) and \(\mathcal{C}_Y\) are the collections of closed subsets of \(X\) and \(Y\), respectively.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.1.1 定义： 一个映射 \(f: (X, \mathcal{T}_X) \to (Y, \mathcal{T}_Y)\)： * 是开映射，当且仅当 \((\forall U \in \mathcal{T}_X)(f(U) \in \mathcal{T}_Y)\)； * 是闭映射，当且仅当 \((\forall A \in \mathcal{C}_X)(f(A) \in \mathcal{C}_Y)\)，其中 \(\mathcal{C}_X\) 和 \(\mathcal{C}_Y\) 分别是 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 的闭子集族。










5.2.1.2 Theorem: Let \(\mathcal{T}_1\) and \(\mathcal{T}_2\) be two topologies on a set \(X\). Then \(\mathcal{T}_1\) is coarser than \(\mathcal{T}_2\) iff the identity map \(\mathrm{id}_X: (X, \mathcal{T}_1) \to (X, \mathcal{T}_2)\) is open.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.1.2 定理： 设 \(\mathcal{T}_1\) 和 \(\mathcal{T}_2\) 是集合 \(X\) 上的两个拓扑。则 \(\mathcal{T}_1\) 比 \(\mathcal{T}_2\) 粗，当且仅当恒等映射 \(\mathrm{id}_X: (X, \mathcal{T}_1) \to (X, \mathcal{T}_2)\) 是开映射。













5.2.2.1 Definition: A topological section is a section in \(\mathsf{Top}\). A topological retraction is a retraction in \(\mathsf{Top}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.1 定义： 拓扑截面是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的截面。拓扑收缩是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的收缩。










5.2.2.2 Definition: A subset \(A\) is called a retract of a topological space \(X\) if the inclusion map \(\iota: A \to X\) is a section.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.2 定义： 如果包含映射 \(\iota: A \to X\) 是一个截面，则子集 \(A\) 称为拓扑空间 \(X\) 的收缩核 (retract)。










5.2.2.3 Remark: A retraction in the sense of [10, Definition 3.13] is a retraction in the sense of Definition 5.2.2.1 with the inclusion map as a section. If \(f: X \to Y\) is a retraction in the sense of Definition 5.2.2.1, with a continuous left inverse \(g: Y \to X\), we let \(\tilde{g}: Y \to g(Y)\) be the submap of \(g\) which is a homeomorphism and then \(\tilde{g} \circ f\) is retraction in the sense of [10, Definition 3.13] from \(X\) to \(g(Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.3 备注： [10, 定义 3.13] 意义下的收缩是指定义 5.2.2.1 意义下且以包含映射为截面的收缩。如果 \(f: X \to Y\) 是定义 5.2.2.1 意义下的收缩，且具有连续左逆 \(g: Y \to X\)，我们设 \(\tilde{g}: Y \to g(Y)\) 为 \(g\) 的子映射且是一个同胚，则 \(\tilde{g} \circ f\) 是 [10, 定义 3.13] 意义下从 \(X\) 到 \(g(Y)\) 的收缩。










5.2.2.4 Remark: A continuous map \(f: X \to Y\) is a homeomorphism iff it is both a retraction and a section. In this case, its inverse \(g: Y \to X\) is also continuous, characterized by \(g \circ f = \mathrm{id}_X\) and \(f \circ g = \mathrm{id}_Y\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.4 备注： 一个连续映射 \(f: X \to Y\) 是同胚，当且仅当它既是收缩又是截面。在这种情况下，其逆映射 \(g: Y \to X\) 也是连续的，且满足 \(g \circ f = \mathrm{id}_X\) 以及 \(f \circ g = \mathrm{id}_Y\)。










5.2.2.5 Question: “Being a retract of” satisfies reflexivity and transitivity.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.5 问题： “是…的收缩核”关系满足自反性和传递性。










5.2.2.6 Theorem: A topological space \(X\) is a retract of \(Y\) iff there is a continuous map \(i: X \to Y\) (or \(r: Y \to X\)) such that for any continuous map \(f: X \to Z\) there is a continuous map \(g: Y \to Z\) making the following diagram on the left (or on the right) commute, that is \(g \circ i = f\) (or \(f \circ r = g\)):





in which case the map \(g\) is unique.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.6 定理： 一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 \(Y\) 的收缩核，当且仅当存在连续映射 \(i: X \to Y\)（或 \(r: Y \to X\)），使得对于任何连续映射 \(f: X \to Z\)，都存在唯一的连续映射 \(g: Y \to Z\) 使左侧（或右侧）的交换图表成立，即 \(g \circ i = f\)（或 \(f \circ r = g\)）。




Proof: For the necessary condition, chase the diagram





For the sufficient condition, for the diagram on the left, choose \(f = \mathrm{id}_X\) and then \(g\) is a retraction; for the diagram on the right, this is an exercise. ■



In \(\mathsf{Top}\), the extremal monomorphisms and epimorphisms have special names.






5.2.3.1 Definition: An embedding is an extremal monomorphism in \(\mathsf{Top}\). A quotient map is an extremal epimorphism in \(\mathsf{Top}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.3.1 定义： 嵌入 (embedding) 是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的极小单态射。商映射 (quotient map) 是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的极大满态射。




Embeddings and quotient maps arise from topological subspaces and quotient spaces; see Section 8.2.2 and Section 8.4.2. We will see there that, not all sections are embeddings, and not all retractions are quotient maps. Therefore, in \(\mathsf{Top}\), monomorphisms, sections, and extremal monomorphisms are different, and epimorphisms, retractions, and extremal epimorphisms are also different.












5.3.1.1 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space with \(p \in X\). An open neighborhood of \(p\) in \(X\) is an open subset \(U\) containing \(p\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.1 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个拓扑空间且 \(p \in X\)。\(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个开邻域是一个包含 \(p\) 的开子集 \(U\)。










5.3.1.2 Proposition: Let \(p\) be a point of a topological space \(X\). A subset \(U\) is an open neighborhood of \(p\) in \(X\) iff \(U\) is open and a neighborhood of \(p\). A subset \(N\) is a neighborhood of \(p\) in \(X\) iff there is an open neighborhood \(U\) of \(p\) in \(X\) that is contained in \(N\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.2 命题： 设 \(p\) 是拓扑空间 \(X\) 中的一个点。子集 \(U\) 是 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个开邻域，当且仅当 \(U\) 是开集且是 \(p\) 的一个邻域。子集 \(N\) 是 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个邻域，当且仅当存在一个包含在 \(N\) 中的 \(p\) 的开邻域 \(U\)。










5.3.1.3 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space with \(p \in X\). A subset \(P\) is a deleted neighborhood of \(p\) in \(X\) if there is a neighborhood \(N\) of \(p\) in \(X\) with \(P = N \setminus \{p\}\). We denote by \(\mathcal{N}_p^\circ\) the collection of deleted neighborhoods of \(p\) in \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.3 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个拓扑空间且 \(p \in X\)。如果存在 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个邻域 \(N\) 使得 \(P = N \setminus \{p\}\)，则子集 \(P\) 称为 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个去心邻域。我们用 \(\mathcal{N}_p^\circ\) 表示 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中所有去心邻域的族。




The characterization of closed subsets in Definition 2.1.2.7 can be generalized to any topological space. First we generalize Definition 2.1.2.6 and some related concepts, including the closure and the derived set that were considered by Cauchy. Then, a subset is closed iff it coincides with its closure.






5.3.1.4 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space with a subset \(A\). Let \(p \in X\) and of \(A, p\) is

an adherent point iff \(A \cap N \neq \emptyset\) for any \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\);
a limit point or an accumulation point iff \(A \cap P \neq \emptyset\) for any \(P \in \mathcal{N}_p^\circ\);
an isolated point iff \(p \in A\) and \(A \cap P = \emptyset\) for some \(P \in \mathcal{N}_p^\circ\).

Then of \(A\),

the closure is the set of adherent points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Cl}(A)\) or \(\bar{A}\) or \(A^-\);
the derived set is the set of accumulation points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Der}(A)\) or \(A'\).



[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.4 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个拓扑空间，\(A\) 是其子集。对于 \(p \in X\)：

\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的触点 (adherent point)，当且仅当对于任何 \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\)，都有 \(A \cap N \neq \emptyset\)；
\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的极限点或聚点 (accumulation point)，当且仅当对于任何 \(P \in \mathcal{N}_p^\circ\)，都有 \(A \cap P \neq \emptyset\)；
\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的孤立点，当且仅当 \(p \in A\) 且对于某个 \(P \in \mathcal{N}_p^\circ\)，有 \(A \cap P = \emptyset\)。

对于子集 \(A\)：

闭包是 \(A\) 的所有触点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Cl}(A)\) 或 \(\bar{A}\) 或 \(A^-\)；
导集是 \(A\) 的所有聚点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Der}(A)\) 或 \(A'\)。











5.3.1.5 Proposition: For any subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\), we have * \(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = A \cup \mathrm{Der}(A)\); * the set of isolated points of \(A\) is \(A \setminus \mathrm{Der}(A)\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.5 命题： 对于拓扑空间 \(X\) 的任何子集 \(A\)，我们有： * \(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = A \cup \mathrm{Der}(A)\)； * \(A\) 的孤立点集为 \(A \setminus \mathrm{Der}(A)\)。




Let \(I\) be an interval in \(\mathbb{R}\) with endpoints \(a < b\). The points in \(\mathbb{R}\) can be classified into three types with respect to \(I\): the interior points of those in \(]a, b[\), the endpoints (or boundary points) \(a\) and \(b\), and the exterior points of those in \(]-\infty, a[ \cup ]b, \infty[\). Then purely interior points constitutes an open interval \(]a, b[\), while together with endpoints constitutes a closed interval \([a, b]\).









5.3.2.1 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space with a subset \(A\) and \(p \in X\) and

\(p\) is an interior point of \(A\), iff \(A \supseteq N\) for some \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\);
\(p\) is an exterior point of \(A\), iff \(A \cap N = \emptyset\) for some \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\);
\(p\) is a boundary point of \(A\), iff \(A \cap N \neq \emptyset\) and \(A^c \cap N \neq \emptyset\) for any \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\).

Then of \(A\),

the interior is the set of interior points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Int}(A)\) or \(A^\circ\);
the exterior is the set of exterior points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Ext}(A)\) or \(A^e\);
the boundary is the set of boundary points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Bd}(A)\) or \(\partial A\) or \(A^b\).



[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.1 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个拓扑空间，\(A\) 是其子集，\(p \in X\)：

\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的内点 (interior point)，当且仅当对于某个 \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\)，有 \(A \supseteq N\)；
\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的外点 (exterior point)，当且仅当对于某个 \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\)，有 \(A \cap N = \emptyset\)；
\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的边界点 (boundary point)，当且仅当对于任何 \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\)，都有 \(A \cap N \neq \emptyset\) 且 \(A^c \cap N \neq \emptyset\)。

对于 \(A\)：

内部是 \(A\) 的所有内点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Int}(A)\) 或 \(A^\circ\)；
外部是 \(A\) 的所有外点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Ext}(A)\) 或 \(A^e\)；
边界是 \(A\) 的所有边界点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Bd}(A)\) 或 \(\partial A\) 或 \(A^b\)。











5.3.2.2 Theorem: The closure of a subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\) is the smallest closed subset of \(X\) containing \(A\); the interior of \(A\) is the largest open subset of \(X\) contained in \(A\); the exterior of a subset \(A\) is the largest open subset of \(X\) disjoint from \(A\). That is to say \[\mathrm{Cl}(A) = \bigcap_{A \subseteq C, C^c \in \mathcal{T}} C, \quad \mathrm{Int}(A) = \bigcup_{A \supseteq U \in \mathcal{T}} U, \quad \mathrm{Ext}(A) = \bigcup_{V \in \mathcal{T}, A \cap V = \emptyset} V \tag{41}\] where \(\mathcal{T}\) is the topology on \(X\) and \(\mathcal{C}\) is the collection of closed subsets of \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.2 定理： 拓扑空间 \(X\) 的子集 \(A\) 的闭包是包含 \(A\) 的最小闭子集；\(A\) 的内部是包含在 \(A\) 中的最大开子集；子集 \(A\) 的外部是与 \(A\) 不相交的最大开子集。也就是说： \[\mathrm{Cl}(A) = \bigcap_{A \subseteq C, C^c \in \mathcal{T}} C, \quad \mathrm{Int}(A) = \bigcup_{A \supseteq U \in \mathcal{T}} U, \quad \mathrm{Ext}(A) = \bigcup_{V \in \mathcal{T}, A \cap V = \emptyset} V \tag{41}\] 其中 \(\mathcal{T}\) 是 \(X\) 上的拓扑，\(\mathcal{C}\) 是 \(X\) 的闭子集族。










5.3.2.3 Proposition: A subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\) coincides with its closure iff it is closed; it coincides with its interior iff it is open. That is to say \[A \in \mathcal{T} \iff A = \mathrm{Int}(A) \iff \mathrm{Bd}(A) \subseteq A^c, \tag{42}\] \[A^c \in \mathcal{C} \iff A = \mathrm{Cl}(A) \iff \mathrm{Bd}(A) \subseteq A.\]


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.3 命题： 拓扑空间 \(X\) 的子集 \(A\) 与其闭包重合当且仅当它是闭集；与其内部重合当且仅当它是开集。即： \[A \in \mathcal{T} \iff A = \mathrm{Int}(A) \iff \mathrm{Bd}(A) \subseteq A^c, \tag{42}\] \[A^c \in \mathcal{C} \iff A = \mathrm{Cl}(A) \iff \mathrm{Bd}(A) \subseteq A.\]










5.3.2.4 Proposition: A set \(N\) is a neighborhood of \(x\) in \(X\) iff \(x\) is an interior point of \(N\), namely, \[N \in \mathcal{N}_x \iff x \in N^\circ. \tag{43}\]


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.4 命题： 集合 \(N\) 是 \(x\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个邻域，当且仅当 \(x\) 是 \(N\) 的一个内点，即： \[N \in \mathcal{N}_x \iff x \in N^\circ. \tag{43}\]










5.3.2.5 Proposition: For any subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\), we have

\(\mathrm{Int}(A) \subseteq A \subseteq \mathrm{Cl}(A)\);
\(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = A \cup \mathrm{Bd}(A) = \mathrm{Int}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Bd}(A)\);
\(X = \mathrm{Int}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Bd}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Ext}(A) = A^\circ \sqcup (\partial A \cap A) \sqcup (\partial A \setminus A) \sqcup A^e\);
\(\mathrm{Int}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A^c)^c, \mathrm{Ext}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A)^c, \mathrm{Bd}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A) \cap \mathrm{Cl}(A^c)\).



[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.5 命题： 对于拓扑空间 \(X\) 的任何子集 \(A\)，我们有：

\(\mathrm{Int}(A) \subseteq A \subseteq \mathrm{Cl}(A)\)；
\(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = A \cup \mathrm{Bd}(A) = \mathrm{Int}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Bd}(A)\)；
\(X = \mathrm{Int}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Bd}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Ext}(A) = A^\circ \sqcup (\partial A \cap A) \sqcup (\partial A \setminus A) \sqcup A^e\)；
\(\mathrm{Int}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A^c)^c, \mathrm{Ext}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A)^c, \mathrm{Bd}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A) \cap \mathrm{Cl}(A^c)\)。





From Proposition 5.3.2.5 one observe that the interior and exterior of a subset can be obtained by successively taking the closure and complement, and would be curious how many different subsets it can generate. The maximal number 14 of distinct subsets is due to Kuratowski; see Exercise 5.3.5.1.






5.3.2.6 Theorem: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be a map between topological spaces. The following are equivalent:

\(f\) is continuous;
\((\forall \text{ closed } B \subseteq Y)(f^{-1}(B) \text{ is closed in } X)\);
for some subbase \(\mathcal{S}_Y\) of the topology on \(Y\) we have \((\forall V \in \mathcal{S}_Y)(f^{-1}(V) \text{ is open in } X)\);
\(f\) is continuous at every point \(p \in X\);
for any subset \(A\) of \(X\) we have \(f(A^-) \subseteq (f(A))^-\);
for any subset \(B\) of \(Y\) we have \(f^{-1}(B)^- \subseteq f^{-1}(B^-)\);
for any subset \(B\) of \(Y\) we have \(f^{-1}(B^\circ) \subseteq f^{-1}(B)^\circ\).



[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.6 定理： 设 \(f: X \to Y\) 是拓扑空间之间的映射。以下各项等价：

\(f\) 是连续的；
对 \(Y\) 的任意闭子集 \(B\)，\(f^{-1}(B)\) 在 \(X\) 中是闭集；
对于 \(Y\) 上拓扑的某个子基 \(\mathcal{S}_Y\)，对任意 \(V \in \mathcal{S}_Y\)，\(f^{-1}(V)\) 在 \(X\) 中是开集；
\(f\) 在 \(X\) 的每个点 \(p\) 处都连续；
对于 \(X\) 的任何子集 \(A\)，有 \(f(A^-) \subseteq (f(A))^-\)；
对于 \(Y\) 的任何子集 \(B\)，有 \(f^{-1}(B)^- \subseteq f^{-1}(B^-)\)；
对于 \(Y\) 的任何子集 \(B\)，有 \(f^{-1}(B^\circ) \subseteq f^{-1}(B)^\circ\)。





Proof: We prove the equivalence of (2), (5), and (6) as an example, and uses the fact for any \(A \subseteq X\) and \(B \subseteq Y\), \[A \subseteq f^{-1}(f(A)), \quad B \supseteq f(f^{-1}(B)). \tag{44}\] If (2) is given, then for any \(A \subseteq X\), the preimage \(f^{-1}(f(A)^-)\) is closed in \(X\) and contains \(A\), then \(f^{-1}(f(A)^-) \supseteq A^-\). By taking the image, we obtain \[f(A^-) \subseteq f(f^{-1}(f(A)^-)) \subseteq f(A)^-, \tag{45}\] which implies (5). If (5) is given, then for any \(B \subseteq Y\), we have \[f(f^{-1}(B)^-) \subseteq f(f^{-1}(B))^- \subseteq B^-, \tag{46}\] which implies \(f^{-1}(B)^-) \subseteq f^{-1}(f(f^{-1}(B)^-)) \subseteq f^{-1}(B^-)\), which is (6). If (6) is given, then for any closed \(B \subseteq Y\), we have \[f^{-1}(B) \subseteq f^{-1}(B)^- \subseteq f^{-1}(B^-) = f^{-1}(B), \tag{47}\] which implies that \(f^{-1}(B)\) is closed in \(X\) and (2) holds. ■






5.3.2.7 Proposition: If \(f: X \to Y\) be a continuous map between topological spaces, then for any \(A \subseteq X\) and \(B \subseteq Y\) with \(B \supseteq f(A)\), the submap \(f|_{A,B}: A \to B\) is continuous.


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.7 命题： 若 \(f: X \to Y\) 是拓扑空间之间的连续映射，则对于满足 \(B \supseteq f(A)\) 的任何 \(A \subseteq X\) 和 \(B \subseteq Y\)，子映射 \(f|_{A,B}: A \to B\) 也是连续的。







The denseness of rational numbers is written in topology terms.






5.3.3.1 Definition: A subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\) is dense if \(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = X\); it has empty interior if \(\mathrm{Int}(A) = \emptyset\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.3.1 定义： 拓扑空间 \(X\) 的子集 \(A\) 如果满足 \(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = X\)，则称其是稠密的 (dense)；如果满足 \(\mathrm{Int}(A) = \emptyset\)，则称其内部为空。










5.3.3.2 Proposition: The rationals \(\mathbb{Q}\) and irrationals \(\mathbb{R} \setminus \mathbb{Q}\) are dense in \(\mathbb{R}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.3.2 命题： 有理数集 \(\mathbb{Q}\) 和无理数集 \(\mathbb{R} \setminus \mathbb{Q}\) 在 \(\mathbb{R}\) 中都是稠密的。













5.3.4.1 The Cantor set: Let \(C_0 = [0, 1]\). Let \(C_1\) be the set \(C_0 \setminus ]\frac{1}{3}, \frac{2}{3}[\) formed by deleting the middle third of \(C_0\). Form \(C_2\) by deleting the middle-thirds \(]\frac{1}{9}, \frac{2}{9}[\) and \(]\frac{7}{9}, \frac{8}{9}[\) from each component of \(C_1\). Inductively, we to define \[C_n = C_{n-1} - \bigcup_{k=0}^{3^{n-1}-1} \left] \frac{1 + 3k}{3^n}, \frac{2 + 3k}{3^n} \right[. \tag{48}\] The Cantor set is given by \(C = \bigcap_{n \in \mathbb{N}} C_n\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.4.1 Cantor 集： 设 \(C_0 = [0, 1]\)。令 \(C_1\) 为集合 \(C_0 \setminus ]\frac{1}{3}, \frac{2}{3}[\)，由删去 \(C_0\) 的中间三分之一构成。从 \(C_1\) 的每个连通分支中删去中间三分之一区间 \(]\frac{1}{9}, \frac{2}{9}[\) 和 \(]\frac{7}{9}, \frac{8}{9}[\) 得到 \(C_2\)。以此类推，我们归纳地定义： \[C_n = C_{n-1} - \bigcup_{k=0}^{3^{n-1}-1} \left] \frac{1 + 3k}{3^n}, \frac{2 + 3k}{3^n} \right[. \tag{48}\] Cantor 集由 \(C = \bigcap_{n \in \mathbb{N}} C_n\) 给出。




Note that each \(C_n\) Example 5.3.4.1 is the union of \(2^n\) disjoint closed intervals of length \(\frac{1}{3^n}\).






5.3.4.2 Proposition: The Cantor set \(C\) is closed in \(\mathbb{R}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.4.2 命题： Cantor 集 \(C\) 在 \(\mathbb{R}\) 中是闭集。














5.4.0.1 Definition: A topological space \(X\) is Hausdorff, iff for any distinct \(p, q \in X\) there are \(U \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\) and \(V \in \mathcal{N}_{X,q}\) such that \(U \cap V = \emptyset\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.4.0.1 定义： 一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 Hausdorff 空间，当且仅当对于任何不同的点 \(p, q \in X\)，都存在 \(U \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\) 和 \(V \in \mathcal{N}_{X,q}\)，使得 \(U \cap V = \emptyset\)。










5.4.0.2 Proposition: The Euclidean space \(\mathbb{R}^n\) is Hausdorff for \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.4.0.2 命题： 对于 \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\)，欧几里得空间 \(\mathbb{R}^n\) 是 Hausdorff 空间。













5.5.0.1 Definition: A topological space \(X\) is separable iff it has a countable dense subset; it is first countable iff it has a neighborhood base for every point; and it is second countable iff it has a countable base.


[点击展开翻译]

5.5.0.1 定义： 一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 称为： * 可分的 (separable)，当且仅当它有一个可数的稠密子集； * 第一可数的 (first countable)，当且仅当它的每个点都有一个可数邻域基； * 第二可数的 (second countable)，当且仅当它有一个可数基。




The base in Example 3.2.1.3 and neighborhood base in Example 3.2.2.5 can be distrilled.






5.5.0.2 Proposition: The Euclidean space \(\mathbb{R}^n\) is separable, first and second countable for \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.5.0.2 命题： 对于 \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\)，欧几里得空间 \(\mathbb{R}^n\) 是可分的，且满足第一和第二可数性公理。













5.6.0.1 Definition: An (elementary) topos is defined to be a category \(\mathsf{E}\) with the following properties:

\(\mathsf{E}\) has all finite limits;
\(\mathsf{E}\) has a subobject classifier;
\(\mathsf{E}\) is cartesian closed.


[点击展开翻译]

5.6.0.1 定义： 一个（初等）Topos 被定义为满足以下性质的范畴 \(\mathsf{E}\)：
\(\mathsf{E}\) 具有所有有限极限；
\(\mathsf{E}\) 具有一个子对象分类器；
\(\mathsf{E}\) 是笛卡尔封闭的。





We recall that requiring \(\mathsf{E}\) to be cartesian closed means requiring that each functor “product with \(b\)” (i.e., \(a \to a \times b\)) has for all \(b\) in \(\mathsf{E}\) a right adjoint \(c \to c^b\), so that \(\mathrm{hom}(a \times b, c) \cong \mathrm{hom}(a, c^b)\). In other words, \(\mathsf{E}\) has exponentials.






5.6.0.2 Example: The category \(\mathsf{Set}\) of all small sets is a topos and so is the category \(\mathsf{Set}^{\mathsf{C}^{\mathrm{op}}}\) of all set-valued contravariant functors on a small category \(\mathsf{C}\). Such a functor \(F : \mathsf{C}^{\mathrm{op}} \to \mathsf{Set}\) is also called a presheaf.


[点击展开翻译]

5.6.0.2 示例： 所有小集合构成的范畴 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 是一个 Topos，小范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 上的所有集合值逆变函子构成的范畴 \(\mathsf{Set}^{\mathsf{C}^{\mathrm{op}}}\) 也是。此类函子 \(F : \mathsf{C}^{\mathrm{op}} \to \mathsf{Set}\) 也被称为前层。




This is in reference to topology, where \(\mathsf{C}\) is the set of all open sets \(U\) of a topological space \(X\). In this case, a presheaf \(F\) assigns to each open set \(U\) a set \(F(U)\), with functorial properties for continuous maps \(U \to V\).






5.6.0.3 Example: Let \(F(U)\) be the set of all continuous real-valued functions on \(U\). In this case, \(F\) is said to be a sheaf (think of the sheaf of coefficients for a cohomology theory!).


[点击展开翻译]

5.6.0.3 示例： 设 \(F(U)\) 为 \(U\) 上所有连续实值函数的集合。在这种情况下，\(F\) 被称为一个层（可以联想上同调理论中的系数层！）。




This and other categories of sheaves play a central role in algebraic geometry and in algebraic topology; the word “topos” is evidently a derivative of the word “topology”, suggesting that a topological structure is essentially described by its topos of sheaves of \(\mathsf{Set}\).
This study of categories of sheaves on topological spaces and their generalization has led to the study of toposes (see Mac Lane–Moerdijk [1992]). In particular, various logical properties are reflected in the subobject classifiers \(Q\) of a topos. Under many circumstances, a topos provides an alternative view of the foundations of mathematics; for example, the use of “forcing” to prove the independence of the continuum hypothesis can be well organized in terms of constructions on toposes (see Mac Lane–Moerdijk [1992], Chapter VI). Also, suitable toposes can replace the category of sets as a foundation for mathematics.
The axioms for a topos have many useful consequences.






5.6.0.4 Proposition: Every topos has all finite colimits.


[点击展开翻译]

5.6.0.4 命题： 每个 Topos 都具有所有有限上极限。
crumbs: 5. MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES

title: MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
text:
The category \(\mathsf{Top}\).






5.1.1.1 The category of small topological spaces: The category \(\mathsf{Top}\) is the category of small topological spaces and continuous maps between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small topological space, and the composition is the composition of maps.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.1 小拓扑空间范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 是以小拓扑空间为对象、以它们之间的连续映射为态射的范畴。恒等态射取每个小拓扑空间上的恒等映射，复合运算即为映射的复合。




The category \(\mathsf{Top}\) is a large but locally small category. 范畴 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 是一个大范畴，但是局部小范畴。






5.1.1.2 Remark: For \(X, Y \in \mathsf{Top}\), the hom-set \(\mathsf{Top}(X, Y)\) is denoted by \(C(X; Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.2 备注： 对于 \(X, Y \in \mathsf{Top}\)，态射集 \(\mathsf{Top}(X, Y)\) 记作 \(C(X; Y)\)。










5.1.1.3 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Top}\) the monomorphisms are the continuous injections, the epimorphisms are the continuous surjections, and the bimorphisms are continuous bijections.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.3 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中，单态射是连续单射，满态射是连续满射，而双态射是连续双射。




Proof: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be a morphism in \(\mathsf{Top}\), namely a continuous map. If \(f\) is monic, then it is left-cancellable. For any \(p_0, p_1 \in X\) with \(f(p_0) = f(p_1)\), we consider the constant maps \(c_{p_0} : * \to X\) and \(c_{p_1} : * \to X\) sending the singleton to \(p_0\) and \(p_1\), respectively; then we have \(f \circ c_{p_0} = f \circ c_{p_1} : X \to Y\). Cancelling \(f\) on the left we have \(c_{p_0} = c_{p_1}\), which implies that \(p_0 = p_1\) and \(f\) is an injection. If \(f\) is injective, then let \(h_0, h_1 : Z \to X\) be continuous maps such that \(f \circ h_0 = f \circ h_1\). For any \(r \in Z\), we have \(f(h_0(r)) = f(h_1(r))\), and by injectivity we have \(h_0(r) = h_1(r)\), this implies that \(h_0 = h_1\). Then, \(f\) is left-cancellable and is a monomorphism.
If \(f\) is epic, then it is right-cancellable. Let \(g_0: Y \to 2_{\text{triv}} = (\{0, 1\}, \mathcal{T}_{\text{triv}})\) be the constant map with value 0. Let \(g_1: Y \to 2_{\text{triv}}\) send all members of \(f(X)\) to 0 and other ones to 1. Then, \(g_0 \circ f = g_1 \circ f : X \to 2_{\text{triv}}\) is the constant map with value 0, but \(g_0 = g_1\) only when \(f(X) = Y\) and \(f\) is a surjection. If \(f\) is surjective, then let \(g_0, g_1 : Y \to Z\) be continuous maps such that \(g_0 \circ f = g_1 \circ f\). For any \(q \in Y\), by surjectivity there is \(p \in f^{-1}(q)\), and we have \(g_0(q) = g_0(f(p)) = g_1(f(p)) = g_1(q)\), this implies that \(g_0 = g_1\). Then, \(f\) is right-cancellable and is an epimorphism. ■






5.1.1.4 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Top}\) the empty space \(\emptyset\) (Example 3.1.3.1) is the initial object and the point spaces (as representatives of) \(*\) (Example 3.1.3.2) are the terminal objects.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.4 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中，空空间 \(\emptyset\)（例 3.1.3.1）是始对象，而点空间（作为其代表的）\(*\)（例 3.1.3.2）是终对象。










5.1.1.5 Proposition: In \(\mathsf{Top}\) the unique morphism from \(\emptyset\) to a topological space \(X\) is the empty map; the initial topology on the set \(X\) induced by this map is the trivial topology. The unique morphism from a topological space \(X\) to (any representative of) \(*\) is the constant map; the final topology on the set \(X\) induced by this map is the discrete topology.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.1.5 命题： 在 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中，从 \(\emptyset\) 到拓扑空间 \(X\) 的唯一态射是空映射；由该映射诱导的集合 \(X\) 上的初始拓扑是平凡拓扑。从拓扑空间 \(X\) 到（任何代表）\(*\) 的唯一态射是常数映射；由该映射诱导的集合 \(X\) 上的最终拓扑是离散拓扑。












5.1.2.1 The category of small pointed topological spaces: The category \(\mathsf{Top}_*\) is the category of small pointed topological spaces and pointed continuous maps between them as morphisms. The identity takes the identity map at each small pointed topological space, and the composition is the composition of pointed maps.


[点击展开翻译]

5.1.2.1 小带基点拓扑空间范畴： 范畴 \(\mathsf{Top}_*\) 是以小带基点拓扑空间为对象、以它们之间的带基点连续映射为态射的范畴。恒等态射取每个小带基点拓扑空间上的恒等映射，复合运算即为带基点映射的复合。

crumbs: 5. MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES

title: MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
text:
5.2.1.1 Definition: A map \[f: (X, \mathcal{T}_X) \to (Y, \mathcal{T}_Y) \tag{39}\] * is open iff \((\forall U \in \mathcal{T}_X)(f(U) \in \mathcal{T}_Y)\); * is closed iff \((\forall A \in \mathcal{C}_X)(f(A) \in \mathcal{C}_Y)\), where \(\mathcal{C}_X\) and \(\mathcal{C}_Y\) are the collections of closed subsets of \(X\) and \(Y\), respectively.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.1.1 定义： 一个映射 \(f: (X, \mathcal{T}_X) \to (Y, \mathcal{T}_Y)\)： * 是开映射，当且仅当 \((\forall U \in \mathcal{T}_X)(f(U) \in \mathcal{T}_Y)\)； * 是闭映射，当且仅当 \((\forall A \in \mathcal{C}_X)(f(A) \in \mathcal{C}_Y)\)，其中 \(\mathcal{C}_X\) 和 \(\mathcal{C}_Y\) 分别是 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 的闭子集族。










5.2.1.2 Theorem: Let \(\mathcal{T}_1\) and \(\mathcal{T}_2\) be two topologies on a set \(X\). Then \(\mathcal{T}_1\) is coarser than \(\mathcal{T}_2\) iff the identity map \(\mathrm{id}_X: (X, \mathcal{T}_1) \to (X, \mathcal{T}_2)\) is open.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.1.2 定理： 设 \(\mathcal{T}_1\) 和 \(\mathcal{T}_2\) 是集合 \(X\) 上的两个拓扑。则 \(\mathcal{T}_1\) 比 \(\mathcal{T}_2\) 粗，当且仅当恒等映射 \(\mathrm{id}_X: (X, \mathcal{T}_1) \to (X, \mathcal{T}_2)\) 是开映射。













5.2.2.1 Definition: A topological section is a section in \(\mathsf{Top}\). A topological retraction is a retraction in \(\mathsf{Top}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.1 定义： 拓扑截面是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的截面。拓扑收缩是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的收缩。










5.2.2.2 Definition: A subset \(A\) is called a retract of a topological space \(X\) if the inclusion map \(\iota: A \to X\) is a section.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.2 定义： 如果包含映射 \(\iota: A \to X\) 是一个截面，则子集 \(A\) 称为拓扑空间 \(X\) 的收缩核 (retract)。










5.2.2.3 Remark: A retraction in the sense of [10, Definition 3.13] is a retraction in the sense of Definition 5.2.2.1 with the inclusion map as a section. If \(f: X \to Y\) is a retraction in the sense of Definition 5.2.2.1, with a continuous left inverse \(g: Y \to X\), we let \(\tilde{g}: Y \to g(Y)\) be the submap of \(g\) which is a homeomorphism and then \(\tilde{g} \circ f\) is retraction in the sense of [10, Definition 3.13] from \(X\) to \(g(Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.3 备注： [10, 定义 3.13] 意义下的收缩是指定义 5.2.2.1 意义下且以包含映射为截面的收缩。如果 \(f: X \to Y\) 是定义 5.2.2.1 意义下的收缩，且具有连续左逆 \(g: Y \to X\)，我们设 \(\tilde{g}: Y \to g(Y)\) 为 \(g\) 的子映射且是一个同胚，则 \(\tilde{g} \circ f\) 是 [10, 定义 3.13] 意义下从 \(X\) 到 \(g(Y)\) 的收缩。










5.2.2.4 Remark: A continuous map \(f: X \to Y\) is a homeomorphism iff it is both a retraction and a section. In this case, its inverse \(g: Y \to X\) is also continuous, characterized by \(g \circ f = \mathrm{id}_X\) and \(f \circ g = \mathrm{id}_Y\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.4 备注： 一个连续映射 \(f: X \to Y\) 是同胚，当且仅当它既是收缩又是截面。在这种情况下，其逆映射 \(g: Y \to X\) 也是连续的，且满足 \(g \circ f = \mathrm{id}_X\) 以及 \(f \circ g = \mathrm{id}_Y\)。
crumbs: 5. MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES

title: MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
text:

[点击展开翻译]

5.2.1.2 定理： 设 \(\mathcal{T}_1\) 和 \(\mathcal{T}_2\) 是集合 \(X\) 上的两个拓扑。则 \(\mathcal{T}_1\) 比 \(\mathcal{T}_2\) 粗，当且仅当恒等映射 \(\mathrm{id}_X: (X, \mathcal{T}_1) \to (X, \mathcal{T}_2)\) 是开映射。













5.2.2.1 Definition: A topological section is a section in \(\mathsf{Top}\). A topological retraction is a retraction in \(\mathsf{Top}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.1 定义： 拓扑截面是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的截面。拓扑收缩是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的收缩。










5.2.2.2 Definition: A subset \(A\) is called a retract of a topological space \(X\) if the inclusion map \(\iota: A \to X\) is a section.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.2 定义： 如果包含映射 \(\iota: A \to X\) 是一个截面，则子集 \(A\) 称为拓扑空间 \(X\) 的收缩核 (retract)。










5.2.2.3 Remark: A retraction in the sense of [10, Definition 3.13] is a retraction in the sense of Definition 5.2.2.1 with the inclusion map as a section. If \(f: X \to Y\) is a retraction in the sense of Definition 5.2.2.1, with a continuous left inverse \(g: Y \to X\), we let \(\tilde{g}: Y \to g(Y)\) be the submap of \(g\) which is a homeomorphism and then \(\tilde{g} \circ f\) is retraction in the sense of [10, Definition 3.13] from \(X\) to \(g(Y)\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.3 备注： [10, 定义 3.13] 意义下的收缩是指定义 5.2.2.1 意义下且以包含映射为截面的收缩。如果 \(f: X \to Y\) 是定义 5.2.2.1 意义下的收缩，且具有连续左逆 \(g: Y \to X\)，我们设 \(\tilde{g}: Y \to g(Y)\) 为 \(g\) 的子映射且是一个同胚，则 \(\tilde{g} \circ f\) 是 [10, 定义 3.13] 意义下从 \(X\) 到 \(g(Y)\) 的收缩。










5.2.2.4 Remark: A continuous map \(f: X \to Y\) is a homeomorphism iff it is both a retraction and a section. In this case, its inverse \(g: Y \to X\) is also continuous, characterized by \(g \circ f = \mathrm{id}_X\) and \(f \circ g = \mathrm{id}_Y\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.4 备注： 一个连续映射 \(f: X \to Y\) 是同胚，当且仅当它既是收缩又是截面。在这种情况下，其逆映射 \(g: Y \to X\) 也是连续的，且满足 \(g \circ f = \mathrm{id}_X\) 以及 \(f \circ g = \mathrm{id}_Y\)。










5.2.2.5 Question: “Being a retract of” satisfies reflexivity and transitivity.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.5 问题： “是…的收缩核”关系满足自反性和传递性。










5.2.2.6 Theorem: A topological space \(X\) is a retract of \(Y\) iff there is a continuous map \(i: X \to Y\) (or \(r: Y \to X\)) such that for any continuous map \(f: X \to Z\) there is a continuous map \(g: Y \to Z\) making the following diagram on the left (or on the right) commute, that is \(g \circ i = f\) (or \(f \circ r = g\)):





in which case the map \(g\) is unique.


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.2.6 定理： 一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 \(Y\) 的收缩核，当且仅当存在连续映射 \(i: X \to Y\)（或 \(r: Y \to X\)），使得对于任何连续映射 \(f: X \to Z\)，都存在唯一的连续映射 \(g: Y \to Z\) 使左侧（或右侧）的交换图表成立，即 \(g \circ i = f\)（或 \(f \circ r = g\)）。




Proof: For the necessary condition, chase the diagram





For the sufficient condition, for the diagram on the left, choose \(f = \mathrm{id}_X\) and then \(g\) is a retraction; for the diagram on the right, this is an exercise. ■



In \(\mathsf{Top}\), the extremal monomorphisms and epimorphisms have special names.






5.2.3.1 Definition: An embedding is an extremal monomorphism in \(\mathsf{Top}\). A quotient map is an extremal epimorphism in \(\mathsf{Top}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.2.3.1 定义： 嵌入 (embedding) 是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的极小单态射。商映射 (quotient map) 是 \(\mathsf{Top}\) 中的极大满态射。




Embeddings and quotient maps arise from topological subspaces and quotient spaces; see Section 8.2.2 and Section 8.4.2. We will see there that, not all sections are embeddings, and not all retractions are quotient maps. Therefore, in \(\mathsf{Top}\), monomorphisms, sections, and extremal monomorphisms are different, and epimorphisms, retractions, and extremal epimorphisms are also different.
crumbs: 5. MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES

title: MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
text:
5.3.1.1 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space with \(p \in X\). An open neighborhood of \(p\) in \(X\) is an open subset \(U\) containing \(p\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.1 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个拓扑空间且 \(p \in X\)。\(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个开邻域是一个包含 \(p\) 的开子集 \(U\)。










5.3.1.2 Proposition: Let \(p\) be a point of a topological space \(X\). A subset \(U\) is an open neighborhood of \(p\) in \(X\) iff \(U\) is open and a neighborhood of \(p\). A subset \(N\) is a neighborhood of \(p\) in \(X\) iff there is an open neighborhood \(U\) of \(p\) in \(X\) that is contained in \(N\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.2 命题： 设 \(p\) 是拓扑空间 \(X\) 中的一个点。子集 \(U\) 是 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个开邻域，当且仅当 \(U\) 是开集且是 \(p\) 的一个邻域。子集 \(N\) 是 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个邻域，当且仅当存在一个包含在 \(N\) 中的 \(p\) 的开邻域 \(U\)。










5.3.1.3 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space with \(p \in X\). A subset \(P\) is a deleted neighborhood of \(p\) in \(X\) if there is a neighborhood \(N\) of \(p\) in \(X\) with \(P = N \setminus \{p\}\). We denote by \(\mathcal{N}_p^\circ\) the collection of deleted neighborhoods of \(p\) in \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.3 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个拓扑空间且 \(p \in X\)。如果存在 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个邻域 \(N\) 使得 \(P = N \setminus \{p\}\)，则子集 \(P\) 称为 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个去心邻域。我们用 \(\mathcal{N}_p^\circ\) 表示 \(p\) 在 \(X\) 中所有去心邻域的族。




The characterization of closed subsets in Definition 2.1.2.7 can be generalized to any topological space. First we generalize Definition 2.1.2.6 and some related concepts, including the closure and the derived set that were considered by Cauchy. Then, a subset is closed iff it coincides with its closure.






5.3.1.4 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space with a subset \(A\). Let \(p \in X\) and of \(A, p\) is

an adherent point iff \(A \cap N \neq \emptyset\) for any \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\);
a limit point or an accumulation point iff \(A \cap P \neq \emptyset\) for any \(P \in \mathcal{N}_p^\circ\);
an isolated point iff \(p \in A\) and \(A \cap P = \emptyset\) for some \(P \in \mathcal{N}_p^\circ\).

Then of \(A\),

the closure is the set of adherent points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Cl}(A)\) or \(\bar{A}\) or \(A^-\);
the derived set is the set of accumulation points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Der}(A)\) or \(A'\).



[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.4 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个拓扑空间，\(A\) 是其子集。对于 \(p \in X\)：

\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的触点 (adherent point)，当且仅当对于任何 \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\)，都有 \(A \cap N \neq \emptyset\)；
\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的极限点或聚点 (accumulation point)，当且仅当对于任何 \(P \in \mathcal{N}_p^\circ\)，都有 \(A \cap P \neq \emptyset\)；
\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的孤立点，当且仅当 \(p \in A\) 且对于某个 \(P \in \mathcal{N}_p^\circ\)，有 \(A \cap P = \emptyset\)。

对于子集 \(A\)：

闭包是 \(A\) 的所有触点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Cl}(A)\) 或 \(\bar{A}\) 或 \(A^-\)；
导集是 \(A\) 的所有聚点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Der}(A)\) 或 \(A'\)。











5.3.1.5 Proposition: For any subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\), we have * \(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = A \cup \mathrm{Der}(A)\); * the set of isolated points of \(A\) is \(A \setminus \mathrm{Der}(A)\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.1.5 命题： 对于拓扑空间 \(X\) 的任何子集 \(A\)，我们有： * \(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = A \cup \mathrm{Der}(A)\)； * \(A\) 的孤立点集为 \(A \setminus \mathrm{Der}(A)\)。




Let \(I\) be an interval in \(\mathbb{R}\) with endpoints \(a < b\). The points in \(\mathbb{R}\) can be classified into three types with respect to \(I\): the interior points of those in \(]a, b[\), the endpoints (or boundary points) \(a\) and \(b\), and the exterior points of those in \(]-\infty, a[ \cup ]b, \infty[\). Then purely interior points constitutes an open interval \(]a, b[\), while together with endpoints constitutes a closed interval \([a, b]\).









5.3.2.1 Definition: Let \(X\) be a topological space with a subset \(A\) and \(p \in X\) and

\(p\) is an interior point of \(A\), iff \(A \supseteq N\) for some \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\);
\(p\) is an exterior point of \(A\), iff \(A \cap N = \emptyset\) for some \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\);
\(p\) is a boundary point of \(A\), iff \(A \cap N \neq \emptyset\) and \(A^c \cap N \neq \emptyset\) for any \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\).

Then of \(A\),

the interior is the set of interior points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Int}(A)\) or \(A^\circ\);
the exterior is the set of exterior points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Ext}(A)\) or \(A^e\);
the boundary is the set of boundary points of \(A\), denoted by \(\mathrm{Bd}(A)\) or \(\partial A\) or \(A^b\).



[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.1 定义： 设 \(X\) 是一个拓扑空间，\(A\) 是其子集，\(p \in X\)：

\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的内点 (interior point)，当且仅当对于某个 \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\)，有 \(A \supseteq N\)；
\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的外点 (exterior point)，当且仅当对于某个 \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\)，有 \(A \cap N = \emptyset\)；
\(p\) 是 \(A\) 的边界点 (boundary point)，当且仅当对于任何 \(N \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\)，都有 \(A \cap N \neq \emptyset\) 且 \(A^c \cap N \neq \emptyset\)。

对于 \(A\)：

内部是 \(A\) 的所有内点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Int}(A)\) 或 \(A^\circ\)；
外部是 \(A\) 的所有外点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Ext}(A)\) 或 \(A^e\)；
边界是 \(A\) 的所有边界点的集合，记作 \(\mathrm{Bd}(A)\) 或 \(\partial A\) 或 \(A^b\)。











5.3.2.2 Theorem: The closure of a subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\) is the smallest closed subset of \(X\) containing \(A\); the interior of \(A\) is the largest open subset of \(X\) contained in \(A\); the exterior of a subset \(A\) is the largest open subset of \(X\) disjoint from \(A\). That is to say \[\mathrm{Cl}(A) = \bigcap_{A \subseteq C, C^c \in \mathcal{T}} C, \quad \mathrm{Int}(A) = \bigcup_{A \supseteq U \in \mathcal{T}} U, \quad \mathrm{Ext}(A) = \bigcup_{V \in \mathcal{T}, A \cap V = \emptyset} V \tag{41}\] where \(\mathcal{T}\) is the topology on \(X\) and \(\mathcal{C}\) is the collection of closed subsets of \(X\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.2 定理： 拓扑空间 \(X\) 的子集 \(A\) 的闭包是包含 \(A\) 的最小闭子集；\(A\) 的内部是包含在 \(A\) 中的最大开子集；子集 \(A\) 的外部是与 \(A\) 不相交的最大开子集。也就是说： \[\mathrm{Cl}(A) = \bigcap_{A \subseteq C, C^c \in \mathcal{T}} C, \quad \mathrm{Int}(A) = \bigcup_{A \supseteq U \in \mathcal{T}} U, \quad \mathrm{Ext}(A) = \bigcup_{V \in \mathcal{T}, A \cap V = \emptyset} V \tag{41}\] 其中 \(\mathcal{T}\) 是 \(X\) 上的拓扑，\(\mathcal{C}\) 是 \(X\) 的闭子集族。










5.3.2.3 Proposition: A subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\) coincides with its closure iff it is closed; it coincides with its interior iff it is open. That is to say \[A \in \mathcal{T} \iff A = \mathrm{Int}(A) \iff \mathrm{Bd}(A) \subseteq A^c, \tag{42}\] \[A^c \in \mathcal{C} \iff A = \mathrm{Cl}(A) \iff \mathrm{Bd}(A) \subseteq A.\]


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.3 命题： 拓扑空间 \(X\) 的子集 \(A\) 与其闭包重合当且仅当它是闭集；与其内部重合当且仅当它是开集。即： \[A \in \mathcal{T} \iff A = \mathrm{Int}(A) \iff \mathrm{Bd}(A) \subseteq A^c, \tag{42}\] \[A^c \in \mathcal{C} \iff A = \mathrm{Cl}(A) \iff \mathrm{Bd}(A) \subseteq A.\]










5.3.2.4 Proposition: A set \(N\) is a neighborhood of \(x\) in \(X\) iff \(x\) is an interior point of \(N\), namely, \[N \in \mathcal{N}_x \iff x \in N^\circ. \tag{43}\]


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.4 命题： 集合 \(N\) 是 \(x\) 在 \(X\) 中的一个邻域，当且仅当 \(x\) 是 \(N\) 的一个内点，即： \[N \in \mathcal{N}_x \iff x \in N^\circ. \tag{43}\]










5.3.2.5 Proposition: For any subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\), we have

\(\mathrm{Int}(A) \subseteq A \subseteq \mathrm{Cl}(A)\);
\(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = A \cup \mathrm{Bd}(A) = \mathrm{Int}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Bd}(A)\);
\(X = \mathrm{Int}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Bd}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Ext}(A) = A^\circ \sqcup (\partial A \cap A) \sqcup (\partial A \setminus A) \sqcup A^e\);
\(\mathrm{Int}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A^c)^c, \mathrm{Ext}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A)^c, \mathrm{Bd}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A) \cap \mathrm{Cl}(A^c)\).



[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.5 命题： 对于拓扑空间 \(X\) 的任何子集 \(A\)，我们有：

\(\mathrm{Int}(A) \subseteq A \subseteq \mathrm{Cl}(A)\)；
\(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = A \cup \mathrm{Bd}(A) = \mathrm{Int}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Bd}(A)\)；
\(X = \mathrm{Int}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Bd}(A) \sqcup \mathrm{Ext}(A) = A^\circ \sqcup (\partial A \cap A) \sqcup (\partial A \setminus A) \sqcup A^e\)；
\(\mathrm{Int}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A^c)^c, \mathrm{Ext}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A)^c, \mathrm{Bd}(A) = \mathrm{Cl}(A) \cap \mathrm{Cl}(A^c)\)。





From Proposition 5.3.2.5 one observe that the interior and exterior of a subset can be obtained by successively taking the closure and complement, and would be curious how many different subsets it can generate. The maximal number 14 of distinct subsets is due to Kuratowski; see Exercise 5.3.5.1.






5.3.2.6 Theorem: Let \(f: X \to Y\) be a map between topological spaces. The following are equivalent:

\(f\) is continuous;
\((\forall \text{ closed } B \subseteq Y)(f^{-1}(B) \text{ is closed in } X)\);
for some subbase \(\mathcal{S}_Y\) of the topology on \(Y\) we have \((\forall V \in \mathcal{S}_Y)(f^{-1}(V) \text{ is open in } X)\);
\(f\) is continuous at every point \(p \in X\);
for any subset \(A\) of \(X\) we have \(f(A^-) \subseteq (f(A))^-\);
for any subset \(B\) of \(Y\) we have \(f^{-1}(B)^- \subseteq f^{-1}(B^-)\);
for any subset \(B\) of \(Y\) we have \(f^{-1}(B^\circ) \subseteq f^{-1}(B)^\circ\).



[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.6 定理： 设 \(f: X \to Y\) 是拓扑空间之间的映射。以下各项等价：

\(f\) 是连续的；
对 \(Y\) 的任意闭子集 \(B\)，\(f^{-1}(B)\) 在 \(X\) 中是闭集；
对于 \(Y\) 上拓扑的某个子基 \(\mathcal{S}_Y\)，对任意 \(V \in \mathcal{S}_Y\)，\(f^{-1}(V)\) 在 \(X\) 中是开集；
\(f\) 在 \(X\) 的每个点 \(p\) 处都连续；
对于 \(X\) 的任何子集 \(A\)，有 \(f(A^-) \subseteq (f(A))^-\)；
对于 \(Y\) 的任何子集 \(B\)，有 \(f^{-1}(B)^- \subseteq f^{-1}(B^-)\)；
对于 \(Y\) 的任何子集 \(B\)，有 \(f^{-1}(B^\circ) \subseteq f^{-1}(B)^\circ\)。





Proof: We prove the equivalence of (2), (5), and (6) as an example, and uses the fact for any \(A \subseteq X\) and \(B \subseteq Y\), \[A \subseteq f^{-1}(f(A)), \quad B \supseteq f(f^{-1}(B)). \tag{44}\] If (2) is given, then for any \(A \subseteq X\), the preimage \(f^{-1}(f(A)^-)\) is closed in \(X\) and contains \(A\), then \(f^{-1}(f(A)^-) \supseteq A^-\). By taking the image, we obtain \[f(A^-) \subseteq f(f^{-1}(f(A)^-)) \subseteq f(A)^-, \tag{45}\] which implies (5). If (5) is given, then for any \(B \subseteq Y\), we have \[f(f^{-1}(B)^-) \subseteq f(f^{-1}(B))^- \subseteq B^-, \tag{46}\] which implies \(f^{-1}(B)^-) \subseteq f^{-1}(f(f^{-1}(B)^-)) \subseteq f^{-1}(B^-)\), which is (6). If (6) is given, then for any closed \(B \subseteq Y\), we have \[f^{-1}(B) \subseteq f^{-1}(B)^- \subseteq f^{-1}(B^-) = f^{-1}(B), \tag{47}\] which implies that \(f^{-1}(B)\) is closed in \(X\) and (2) holds. ■






5.3.2.7 Proposition: If \(f: X \to Y\) be a continuous map between topological spaces, then for any \(A \subseteq X\) and \(B \subseteq Y\) with \(B \supseteq f(A)\), the submap \(f|_{A,B}: A \to B\) is continuous.


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.2.7 命题： 若 \(f: X \to Y\) 是拓扑空间之间的连续映射，则对于满足 \(B \supseteq f(A)\) 的任何 \(A \subseteq X\) 和 \(B \subseteq Y\)，子映射 \(f|_{A,B}: A \to B\) 也是连续的。







The denseness of rational numbers is written in topology terms.






5.3.3.1 Definition: A subset \(A\) of a topological space \(X\) is dense if \(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = X\); it has empty interior if \(\mathrm{Int}(A) = \emptyset\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.3.1 定义： 拓扑空间 \(X\) 的子集 \(A\) 如果满足 \(\mathrm{Cl}(A) = X\)，则称其是稠密的 (dense)；如果满足 \(\mathrm{Int}(A) = \emptyset\)，则称其内部为空。










5.3.3.2 Proposition: The rationals \(\mathbb{Q}\) and irrationals \(\mathbb{R} \setminus \mathbb{Q}\) are dense in \(\mathbb{R}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.3.2 命题： 有理数集 \(\mathbb{Q}\) 和无理数集 \(\mathbb{R} \setminus \mathbb{Q}\) 在 \(\mathbb{R}\) 中都是稠密的。













5.3.4.1 The Cantor set: Let \(C_0 = [0, 1]\). Let \(C_1\) be the set \(C_0 \setminus ]\frac{1}{3}, \frac{2}{3}[\) formed by deleting the middle third of \(C_0\). Form \(C_2\) by deleting the middle-thirds \(]\frac{1}{9}, \frac{2}{9}[\) and \(]\frac{7}{9}, \frac{8}{9}[\) from each component of \(C_1\). Inductively, we to define \[C_n = C_{n-1} - \bigcup_{k=0}^{3^{n-1}-1} \left] \frac{1 + 3k}{3^n}, \frac{2 + 3k}{3^n} \right[. \tag{48}\] The Cantor set is given by \(C = \bigcap_{n \in \mathbb{N}} C_n\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.4.1 Cantor 集： 设 \(C_0 = [0, 1]\)。令 \(C_1\) 为集合 \(C_0 \setminus ]\frac{1}{3}, \frac{2}{3}[\)，由删去 \(C_0\) 的中间三分之一构成。从 \(C_1\) 的每个连通分支中删去中间三分之一区间 \(]\frac{1}{9}, \frac{2}{9}[\) 和 \(]\frac{7}{9}, \frac{8}{9}[\) 得到 \(C_2\)。以此类推，我们归纳地定义： \[C_n = C_{n-1} - \bigcup_{k=0}^{3^{n-1}-1} \left] \frac{1 + 3k}{3^n}, \frac{2 + 3k}{3^n} \right[. \tag{48}\] Cantor 集由 \(C = \bigcap_{n \in \mathbb{N}} C_n\) 给出。




Note that each \(C_n\) Example 5.3.4.1 is the union of \(2^n\) disjoint closed intervals of length \(\frac{1}{3^n}\).






5.3.4.2 Proposition: The Cantor set \(C\) is closed in \(\mathbb{R}\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.3.4.2 命题： Cantor 集 \(C\) 在 \(\mathbb{R}\) 中是闭集。
crumbs: 5. MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES

title: MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
text:
5.4.0.1 Definition: A topological space \(X\) is Hausdorff, iff for any distinct \(p, q \in X\) there are \(U \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\) and \(V \in \mathcal{N}_{X,q}\) such that \(U \cap V = \emptyset\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.4.0.1 定义： 一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 是 Hausdorff 空间，当且仅当对于任何不同的点 \(p, q \in X\)，都存在 \(U \in \mathcal{N}_{X,p}\) 和 \(V \in \mathcal{N}_{X,q}\)，使得 \(U \cap V = \emptyset\)。










5.4.0.2 Proposition: The Euclidean space \(\mathbb{R}^n\) is Hausdorff for \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.4.0.2 命题： 对于 \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\)，欧几里得空间 \(\mathbb{R}^n\) 是 Hausdorff 空间。
crumbs: 5. MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES

title: MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
text:
5.5.0.1 Definition: A topological space \(X\) is separable iff it has a countable dense subset; it is first countable iff it has a neighborhood base for every point; and it is second countable iff it has a countable base.


[点击展开翻译]

5.5.0.1 定义： 一个拓扑空间 \(X\) 称为： * 可分的 (separable)，当且仅当它有一个可数的稠密子集； * 第一可数的 (first countable)，当且仅当它的每个点都有一个可数邻域基； * 第二可数的 (second countable)，当且仅当它有一个可数基。




The base in Example 3.2.1.3 and neighborhood base in Example 3.2.2.5 can be distrilled.






5.5.0.2 Proposition: The Euclidean space \(\mathbb{R}^n\) is separable, first and second countable for \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\).


[点击展开翻译]

5.5.0.2 命题： 对于 \(n \in \mathbb{N}_0\)，欧几里得空间 \(\mathbb{R}^n\) 是可分的，且满足第一和第二可数性公理。
crumbs: 5. MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES

title: MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
text:
5.6.0.1 Definition: An (elementary) topos is defined to be a category \(\mathsf{E}\) with the following properties:

\(\mathsf{E}\) has all finite limits;
\(\mathsf{E}\) has a subobject classifier;
\(\mathsf{E}\) is cartesian closed.


[点击展开翻译]

5.6.0.1 定义： 一个（初等）Topos 被定义为满足以下性质的范畴 \(\mathsf{E}\)：
\(\mathsf{E}\) 具有所有有限极限；
\(\mathsf{E}\) 具有一个子对象分类器；
\(\mathsf{E}\) 是笛卡尔封闭的。





We recall that requiring \(\mathsf{E}\) to be cartesian closed means requiring that each functor “product with \(b\)” (i.e., \(a \to a \times b\)) has for all \(b\) in \(\mathsf{E}\) a right adjoint \(c \to c^b\), so that \(\mathrm{hom}(a \times b, c) \cong \mathrm{hom}(a, c^b)\). In other words, \(\mathsf{E}\) has exponentials.






5.6.0.2 Example: The category \(\mathsf{Set}\) of all small sets is a topos and so is the category \(\mathsf{Set}^{\mathsf{C}^{\mathrm{op}}}\) of all set-valued contravariant functors on a small category \(\mathsf{C}\). Such a functor \(F : \mathsf{C}^{\mathrm{op}} \to \mathsf{Set}\) is also called a presheaf.


[点击展开翻译]

5.6.0.2 示例： 所有小集合构成的范畴 \(\mathsf{Set}\) 是一个 Topos，小范畴 \(\mathsf{C}\) 上的所有集合值逆变函子构成的范畴 \(\mathsf{Set}^{\mathsf{C}^{\mathrm{op}}}\) 也是。此类函子 \(F : \mathsf{C}^{\mathrm{op}} \to \mathsf{Set}\) 也被称为前层。




This is in reference to topology, where \(\mathsf{C}\) is the set of all open sets \(U\) of a topological space \(X\). In this case, a presheaf \(F\) assigns to each open set \(U\) a set \(F(U)\), with functorial properties for continuous maps \(U \to V\).






5.6.0.3 Example: Let \(F(U)\) be the set of all continuous real-valued functions on \(U\). In this case, \(F\) is said to be a sheaf (think of the sheaf of coefficients for a cohomology theory!).


[点击展开翻译]

5.6.0.3 示例： 设 \(F(U)\) 为 \(U\) 上所有连续实值函数的集合。在这种情况下，\(F\) 被称为一个层（可以联想上同调理论中的系数层！）。




This and other categories of sheaves play a central role in algebraic geometry and in algebraic topology; the word “topos” is evidently a derivative of the word “topology”, suggesting that a topological structure is essentially described by its topos of sheaves of \(\mathsf{Set}\).
This study of categories of sheaves on topological spaces and their generalization has led to the study of toposes (see Mac Lane–Moerdijk [1992]). In particular, various logical properties are reflected in the subobject classifiers \(Q\) of a topos. Under many circumstances, a topos provides an alternative view of the foundations of mathematics; for example, the use of “forcing” to prove the independence of the continuum hypothesis can be well organized in terms of constructions on toposes (see Mac Lane–Moerdijk [1992], Chapter VI). Also, suitable toposes can replace the category of sets as a foundation for mathematics.
The axioms for a topos have many useful consequences.






5.6.0.4 Proposition: Every topos has all finite colimits.


[点击展开翻译]

5.6.0.4 命题： 每个 Topos 都具有所有有限上极限。
crumbs: 5. MAPS BETWEEN AND SUBSETS OF TOPOLOGICAL SPACES
